metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: DNS activity ASIM parser for Halcyon
properties.query:
let parser = (disabled:bool=false) {
    // DNS query class name -> numeric class ID lookup (standard DNS CLASS values).
    let DnsClassLookup = datatable(DnsQueryClassName:string, DnsQueryClass:int)
    [
        "IN", 1, "CH", 3, "HS", 4, "NONE", 254, "ANY", 255
    ];
    HalcyonEventsV2_CL
    | where not(disabled)
        and class_uid == 4003                                    // OCSF DnsActivity (constant for class 4003)
    | extend DnsQueryClassName = coalesce(tostring(query.['class']), "IN")           // OCSF query.class (constant "IN")
    | lookup kind=leftouter DnsClassLookup on DnsQueryClassName
    | extend
        EventType           = "Query",                                             // ASIM Dns EventType enum has no Response/Traffic; Halcyon emits only queries
        DnsQuery            = tostring(query.hostname),                              // OCSF query.hostname
        DnsResponseCode     = toint(rcode_id),                                       // OCSF rcode_id (constant 0 = NoError; resolution succeeded)
        DnsResponseCodeName = coalesce(tostring(rcode), tostring(_ASIM_LookupDnsResponseCode(toint(rcode_id)))),  // Halcyon emits rcode "NoError"; datatable fallback on rcode_id
        DnsResponseName     = tostring(answers[0].rdata),
        SrcUsername         = tostring(actor.user.name),
        SrcUserId           = tostring(actor.user.uid),
        SrcProcessName      = tostring(actor.process.file.name),
        SrcProcessId        = tostring(actor.process.pid),
        SrcProcessCommandLine = tostring(actor.process.cmd_line),
        DvcHostname_raw     = tostring(device.hostname),
        DvcId               = tostring(device.uid),
        EventOriginalSeverity = tostring(severity)
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN('DvcHostname_raw')
    | extend
        EventSubType    = case(activity_id == 1, "Request", activity_id == 2, "Response", "Request"),
        // Security verdict drives EventResult/DvcAction, NOT rcode_id (always 0/NoError). Validated against Halcyon
        // security verdict mapping: Block (action_id 2) => Failure/Block, Report (action_id 1) => Success/Allow.
        EventResult     = case(action_id == 2, "Failure", action_id == 1, "Success", "NA"),
        DvcAction       = case(action_id == 2, "Block", action_id == 1, "Allow", ""),
        EventResultDetails = DnsResponseCodeName,
        EventSeverity   = case(
                              EventOriginalSeverity in~ ("Informational", "Info"), "Informational",
                              EventOriginalSeverity =~ "Low", "Low",
                              EventOriginalSeverity =~ "Medium", "Medium",
                              EventOriginalSeverity in~ ("High", "Critical", "Fatal"), "High",
                              EventOriginalSeverity =~ "Unknown", "Informational",
                              "Informational"),
        EventStartTime  = coalesce(HalcyonSourceTime, TimeGenerated),
        Domain          = DnsQuery,
        Dvc             = coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname_raw),
        DvcIdType       = iff(isnotempty(DvcId), "Other", ""),
        SrcUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(SrcUsername), "Simple", ""),
        SrcUserIdType   = case(
                              isempty(SrcUserId), "",
                              SrcUserId startswith "S-1-", "SID",
                              "Other"),
        // src_endpoint.hostname == device.hostname in Halcyon events, so source-side host fields mirror the resolved device fields.
        SrcHostname     = DvcHostname,                                               // short hostname (ASIM Hostname type - no dots)
        SrcFQDN         = DvcFQDN,                                                    // FQDN when device.hostname is fully-qualified, else empty
        Src             = DvcHostname,                                               // Src alias for Hostname
        Hostname        = DvcHostname,                                               // required alias
        Process         = SrcProcessName,
        User            = SrcUsername,
        // All events in this class are security-flagged detections.
        ThreatCategory  = "Malicious DNS",                                           // reasonable default given source semantics; validate with customers
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel = tostring(severity)
    | extend
        EventEndTime    = EventStartTime,
        EventCount      = int(1),
        EventUid        = HalcyonEventId,
        EventOriginalUid = HalcyonEventId,
        EventMessage    = tostring(message),
        EventOriginalType = tostring(type_name),
        EventOriginalSubType = tostring(activity_name),
        EventProduct    = "Halcyon",
        EventVendor     = "Halcyon",
        EventSchema     = "Dns",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.7",
        AdditionalFields = bag_pack(
                              "halcyon_dxp_rule",  tostring(unmapped.halcyon_dxp_rule),
                              "halcyon_alert_id",  tostring(unmapped.halcyon_alert_id),
                              "halcyon_tenant_id", tostring(unmapped.halcyon_tenant_id)
                          )
    // Project only ASIM Dns/Common output columns (avoids project-away so new source columns don't leak into output).
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventType,
        DnsQueryClassName,
        DnsQueryClass,
        DnsQuery,
        DnsResponseCode,
        DnsResponseCodeName,
        DnsResponseName,
        SrcUsername,
        SrcUserId,
        SrcProcessName,
        SrcProcessId,
        DvcId,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        DvcHostname,
        DvcFQDN,
        DvcDomain,
        DvcDomainType,
        EventSubType,
        EventResult,
        DvcAction,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventSeverity,
        EventStartTime,
        Domain,
        Dvc,
        DvcIdType,
        SrcUsernameType,
        SrcUserIdType,
        SrcHostname,
        SrcFQDN,
        Src,
        Hostname,
        Process,
        User,
        ThreatCategory,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
        EventEndTime,
        EventCount,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventMessage,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalSubType,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        AdditionalFields
};
parser(disabled=disabled)
